sourcesContent:
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useAuthContext } from '../../context/AuthContext'; import { usePostsContext } from '../../context/PostsContext'; import { useTodosContext } from '../../context/TodosContext'; import { PATHS } from '../../router/paths'; import './style.css'; export default function HomePage() { const { user, isLoggedIn } = useAuthContext(); const { posts } = usePostsContext(); const { todos } = useTodosContext(); const completedTodos = todos.filter((todo) => todo.completed).length; const pendingTodos = todos.length - completedTodos; const completionRate = todos.length > 0 ? Math.round((completedTodos / todos.length) * 100) : 0; const recentTodos = [...todos].sort((firstTodo, secondTodo) => Number(secondTodo.id) - Number(firstTodo.id)).slice(0, 4); const recentPosts = [...posts].sort((firstPost, secondPost) => Number(secondPost.id) - Number(firstPost.id)).slice(0, 4); return (

Productivity Dashboard

{isLoggedIn ? (
Welcome back, {user?.name}
) : (
Guest mode active
)}

Manage tasks, notes, and progress from one polished workspace.

Track pending work, capture quick notes, and keep your learning flow organized with a cleaner dashboard built around your day-to-day actions.

Open Tasks Open Notes {!isLoggedIn ? ( Login To Unlock More ) : null}

Today At A Glance

{todos.length} Total Tasks
{pendingTodos} Pending Tasks
{posts.length} Saved Notes
{completionRate}% Completion Rate

Quick Actions

Move your day forward

Add Task Write Note {isLoggedIn ? ( <> Update Profile Open Settings ) : ( Login First )}

Tasks Snapshot

Recent Tasks

Open all
{recentTodos.map((todo) => (
{todo.title} {todo.completed ? 'Completed' : 'Pending'}
{todo.completed ? 'Done' : 'Next'}
))}

Notes Snapshot

Recent Notes

Open all
{recentPosts.map((post) => (
{post.title} User {post.userId}
#{post.id}
))}

Focus

Progress Summary

{completionRate}% completed {completedTodos} finished out of {todos.length || 0} tasks
Notes

Content Hub

Create, edit, sort, and review your notes with a lightweight CRUD workspace.

Tasks

Task Board

Manage task status, update items fast, and keep daily priorities visible.

Tracking

Quick Counter

Use a focused counter panel for progress checks and small interaction demos.

{isLoggedIn ? ( Workspace

Profile

Keep your identity, goals, and profile overview in one editable personal area.

) : ( Access

Login

Sign in to open your profile, settings, and the more personal parts of the workspace.

)} System

Lifecycle

Review state transitions and class lifecycle behavior inside a clean demo page.

Overview

About

See the project structure, reusable sections, and the product direction in one place.

Reference

Router Guide

Keep a practical guide to routes, params, links, and navigation patterns nearby.

{isLoggedIn ? ( Control

Settings

Manage appearance mode, jump between key sections, and keep the workspace feeling consistent.

) : null}
); }
